case_title: DEBORAH PAULEY VS. ODEH J. ABDEL JABBAR

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PAULEY, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT ABDEL JABBAR, ODEH J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: CONTIUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WHO WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY CASSANDRA PERKINS--CASE MANAGER; WHO ASKED FOR CONTINUANCE ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF BUT DEFENDANT DID NOT AGREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION . SENT TO PLAINTIFF
